subtitle: Te Oneroa-a-Tōhē: the 88-kilometre west-coast beach that is a gazetted New Zealand highway and a Māori spirit-path toward Cape Reinga.
spike_statement: An 88-km strip of sand gazetted as a legal road, yet the incoming Tasman tide and Te Paki quicksand strand rental cars on it every year.

levers.photo_tone: cold Tasman blue over pale wind-combed dune sand, low sun raking a flat horizon
